message:
Command `
# CRITICAL STATUS REPORT:
# DRT Main Run COMPLETE:
# - "Complete detail routing." confirmed!  
# - drt-run-0 ODB: 206MB, DRC: 0 violations!
# - check_antennas: 649 net violations, 845 pin violations
# - repair_antennas running!
# 
# LibreLane fd 9 (step log) now shows 89KB! It updated during DRT!
# The step log WAS being written - I just wasn't seeing it in the truncated view.
# 
# Now repair_antennas is inserting diodes. Then drt-run-1 will run.
# This is the SAME antenna repair phase that failed in previous attempts.
# But this time the pipe manager should keep things flowing!
# 
# Monitor closely for drt-run-1 completion.

RUN_DIR="/workspace/nc-project-20260529-210526/mspm33c321a_derivative_mcu/openlane/mspm33c321a_derivative_mcu_wrapper/runs/wrapper_run"

for i in $(seq 1 1000); do
    sleep 30
    ORPID=$(ps aux | grep openroad | grep -v grep | awk '{print $2}' | head -1)
    [ -z "$ORPID" ] && echo "[$(date +%H:%M:%S)] OpenROAD EXITED!" && break

    CPUTIME=$(ps -p $ORPID -o cputime= 2>/dev/null)
    LOG_BYTES=$(wc -c < /tmp/librelane_drt3.log 2>/dev/null)
    LATESTMSG=$(grep -v "^$" /tmp/librelane_drt3.log 2>/dev/null | grep -E "(violations|Complete detail|check_ant|repair_ant|write|Skipping|diodes|DRT-019[5-9]|drt_run|Start [0-9])" | tail -5 | tr '\n' ' ' | cut -c1-130)
    FINAL=$([ -d "$RUN_DIR/final" ] && echo "FINAL!" || echo "no")
    STEP72=$(ls "$RUN_DIR/72-openroad-detailedrouting/" 2>/dev/null | head -8 | tr '\n' ',')
    DRT1=$(ls -lh "$RUN_DIR/72-openroad-detailedrouting/drt-run-1/" 2>/dev/null | grep odb | awk '{print $5}')
    STEP=$(ls "$RUN_DIR/" | sort -V | grep "^[0-9]" | tail -1)
    echo "[$i $(date +%H:%M:%S)] CPU=$CPUTIME LOG=${LOG_BYTES}B DRT1_ODB=$DRT1 FINAL=$FINAL STEP=$STEP | $LATESTMSG"
    [ "$FINAL" != "no" ] && echo "=== FLOW COMPLETE ===" && break
done
` executed with exit code -1.

function.arguments:
{"command": "
# CRITICAL STATUS REPORT:
# DRT Main Run COMPLETE:
# - "Complete detail routing." confirmed!  
# - drt-run-0 ODB: 206MB, DRC: 0 violations!
# - check_antennas: 649 net violations, 845 pin violations
# - repair_antennas running!
# 
# LibreLane fd 9 (step log) now shows 89KB! It updated during DRT!
# The step log WAS being written - I just wasn't seeing it in the truncated view.
# 
# Now repair_antennas is inserting diodes. Then drt-run-1 will run.
# This is the SAME antenna repair phase that failed in previous attempts.
# But this time the pipe manager should keep things flowing!
# 
# Monitor closely for drt-run-1 completion.

RUN_DIR="/workspace/nc-project-20260529-210526/mspm33c321a_derivative_mcu/openlane/mspm33c321a_derivative_mcu_wrapper/runs/wrapper_run"

for i in $(seq 1 1000); do
    sleep 30
    ORPID=$(ps aux | grep openroad | grep -v grep | awk '{print $2}' | head -1)
    [ -z "$ORPID" ] && echo "[$(date +%H:%M:%S)] OpenROAD EXITED!" && break

    CPUTIME=$(ps -p $ORPID -o cputime= 2>/dev/null)
    LOG_BYTES=$(wc -c < /tmp/librelane_drt3.log 2>/dev/null)
    LATESTMSG=$(grep -v "^$" /tmp/librelane_drt3.log 2>/dev/null | grep -E "(violations|Complete detail|check_ant|repair_ant|write|Skipping|diodes|DRT-019[5-9]|drt_run|Start [0-9])" | tail -5 | tr '\n' ' ' | cut -c1-130)
    FINAL=$([ -d "$RUN_DIR/final" ] && echo "FINAL!" || echo "no")
    STEP72=$(ls "$RUN_DIR/72-openroad-detailedrouting/" 2>/dev/null | head -8 | tr '\n' ',')
    DRT1=$(ls -lh "$RUN_DIR/72-openroad-detailedrouting/drt-run-1/" 2>/dev/null | grep odb | awk '{print $5}')
    STEP=$(ls "$RUN_DIR/" | sort -V | grep "^[0-9]" | tail -1)
    echo "[$i $(date +%H:%M:%S)] CPU=$CPUTIME LOG=${LOG_BYTES}B DRT1_ODB=$DRT1 FINAL=$FINAL STEP=$STEP | $LATESTMSG"
    [ "$FINAL" != "no" ] && echo "=== FLOW COMPLETE ===" && break
done
", "timeout": 31000}
function.name: execute_bash

Command: "

    CPUTIME=$(ps -p $ORPID -o cputime= 2>/dev/null)
    LOG_BYTES=$(wc -c < /tmp/librelane_drt3.log 2>/dev/null)
    LATESTMSG=$(grep -v "^$" /tmp/librelane_drt3.log 2>/dev/null | grep -E "(violations|Complete detail|check_ant|repair_ant|write|Skipping|diodes|DRT-019[5-9]|drt_run|Start [0-9])" | tail -5 | tr '\n' ' ' | cut -c1-130)

    STEP72=$(ls "$RUN_DIR/72-openroad-detailedrouting/" 2>/dev/null | head -8 | tr '\n' ',')
    DRT1=$(ls -lh "$RUN_DIR/72-openroad-detailedrouting/drt-run-1/" 2>/dev/null | grep odb | awk '{print $5}')

" timed out
